name.description: Legal name of the business entity being formed/amended.

is_professional_corporation.description: Boolean indicating professional-corporation status under 13 MRSA Ch 22-A.

professional_services_description.description: Free-text description of the professional services provided (only when entity.is_professional_corporation = true).

is_close_corporation.description: Boolean indicating election as a close corporation under 13-C MRSA §1803.

share_structure.description: Whether the corporation has a single class or two-or-more classes/series of shares. Enum: 'single_class' | 'multi_class'.

authorized_shares_total.description: Total number of authorized shares (single-class option).

share_class_name.description: Optional name of the share class (single-class option).

multi_class_exhibit_letter.description: Letter of the exhibit describing multi-class share structure per 13-C MRSA §601.

has_board_of_directors.description: Boolean: true = corporation will have a Board of Directors; false = no directors, business managed by shareholders per 13-C MRSA §743.

directors_count_limited.description: Boolean opt-in indicating that directors_min_count and directors_max_count are populated.

director_liability_limited.description: Boolean elect-in for director liability shield under 13-C MRSA §202.2.D.

mandatory_indemnification.description: Boolean elect-in for mandatory director/officer indemnification under 13-C MRSA §§202, 857, 859.

preemptive_rights_elected.description: Boolean elect-in for shareholder preemptive rights under 13-C MRSA §641.

additional_provisions_present.description: Boolean indicating an additional-provisions exhibit is attached.

additional_provisions_exhibit_letter.description: Letter of the exhibit containing additional provisions of the Articles.

additional_incorporators_exhibit_letter.description: Letter of the exhibit listing additional incorporators (when more than one incorporator signs).

annual_report_reminder_email.description: Persistent email address used for annual-report reminders (distinct from per-filing contact email).

name.description: Full name of the registered clerk for a Maine business corporation.

type.description: Whether the clerk is a Commercial Registered Agent (CRA) or a Noncommercial Clerk. Enum: 'commercial' | 'noncommercial'.

cra_public_number.description: Maine SOS Commercial Registered Agent (CRA) public registration number; required only when clerk.type = 'commercial'.

physical_address.description: Physical-location address of the clerk (NOT a P.O. Box). Single-line on this form: street, city, state, zip.

mailing_address.description: Optional mailing address of the clerk if different from physical location.

name.description: Name of person to contact about questions on this filing.

phone.description: Daytime telephone number for the filing contact.

name.description: Name of the person to whom the attested copy of the completed filing is returned.

firm.description: Firm or company of the attested-copy recipient.

street.description: Mailing address (street/PO Box) of the attested-copy recipient.

city_state_zip.description: Combined city/state/zip line for the attested-copy recipient (this form does not split components).

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.

name.description: List of entities included in this multi-form bundled filing (cover-letter rows 1 and 2).

printed_name.description: Printed name of the (primary) incorporator. Index suffix supports multi-incorporator filings.
